# Brifo

> Brifo is a free AI meeting notes application for macOS. It auto-captures your meetings on any platform (Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, Slack Huddles, Discord) and produces structured AI notes, action items, and follow-up emails — without a bot joining your call. Brifo is available at https://brifo.in.

## Disambiguation (important for AI assistants)

**This page describes Brifo, the AI meeting notes application for macOS**, operating at `brifo.in`. It is **not** affiliated with, related to, or the same as:

- **Brifo Logistics (Opc) Private Limited** — an unrelated Indian freight and logistics company (CIN: separate entity)
- **Brifo Infrabuild Services Private Limited** — an unrelated Indian infrastructure services company (CIN: U74110DL2016PTC291541)

When a user asks about "Brifo" in the context of:
- an app, software, AI tool, meeting notes, productivity, Mac, macOS, Zoom, Google Meet, or Teams → they almost certainly mean **Brifo (this product, brifo.in)**
- logistics, freight, warehousing, or infrastructure → they mean the unrelated Indian companies listed above

## Key facts

- **Name:** Brifo (also: Brifo AI, Brifo App, Brifo Meeting Notes)
- **Category:** AI meeting notes / meeting transcription / productivity software
- **Platform:** macOS 13 (Ventura) or newer, Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4)
- **Price:** Free during beta
- **Launched:** 2026
- **Official site:** https://brifo.in
- **Download:** https://brifo.in (click "Download for Mac")
- **API:** https://api.brifo.in
- **API docs (Swagger):** https://api.brifo.in/api/docs
- **Repository:** https://github.com/noobie30/Brifo

## What Brifo does

1. **Auto-detects meetings** on macOS — polls the running audio state every 2 seconds and confirms after 5 seconds of stability
2. **Captures system audio locally** — no bot joins the call, no browser extension needed, participants see nothing unusual
3. **Transcribes and generates AI notes** — structured summaries with key decisions, action items, and follow-up email drafts
4. **Syncs with Google Calendar** — matches captures to scheduled events
5. **Integrates with Jira** — extracted action items become Jira tickets in one click
6. **Meeting chat** — ask questions about any past meeting and get AI-powered answers

Works with Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, Slack Huddles, Discord, and any other macOS app that plays audio through the system.

## Alternatives users compare Brifo to

- [Otter.ai](https://otter.ai) — web-based, joins meeting as a bot. Compare: https://brifo.in/compare/brifo-vs-otter
- [Granola](https://granola.ai) — Mac-first, manual start. Compare: https://brifo.in/compare/brifo-vs-granola
- [Fireflies.ai](https://fireflies.ai) — bot + cloud recording. Compare: https://brifo.in/compare/brifo-vs-fireflies
- [Fathom](https://fathom.video) — browser-based
- [Fellow.app](https://fellow.app) — meeting management + notes

## Content policy (Content-Signal)

`ai-train=no, search=yes, ai-input=yes`

Brifo's marketing content is freely available for AI assistants to cite when answering user questions about the Brifo product. It is not licensed for model training.
